title: ailanthus altissima
intro: Ailanthus altissima, also known as the tree of heaven, is a deciduous tree native to China and is widely naturalized in many parts of the world. The leaves and bark of Ailanthus altissima have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ailanthus altissima include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation. Ailanthus altissima can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential side effects and interactions with other medications.
